@startuml
title 解析处理@EnableTransactionManagement注解

participant "ConfigurationClassPostProcessor" as ConfigurationClassPostProcessor #D3E6F8 
participant "ConfigurationClassParser" as ConfigurationClassParser #B2DFDB  
participant ComponentScanAnnotationParser#FFCCBC   
participant AdviceModelImportSelector#C5CAE9    
participant TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector#FFE0B2     
participant ConfigurationClass#FFF9C4      
participant ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader#CFD8DC       
participant AutoProxyRegistrar#BBDEFB        
participant AopConfigUtils#CE93D8 

== postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry ==
activate ConfigurationClassPostProcessor
    activate ConfigurationClassParser
    
        note right of ConfigurationClassParser : [当前被解析的class标识@ComponentScann，进行扫描]
            alt //当有@Configuration类时//
                loop for each config class in registry.getAnnotatedBeans() { }
                    parse(String className) ->> ConfigurationClassParser
                    
                        doParse(ConfigurationClass configurationClass, SourceClass sourceClass)->>ComponentScanAnnotationParser
                        
                            scanCandidateComponents(sourceClassName).getMetadata().isIndependent()->>AopConfigUtils::registerAutoProxyCreatorIfNecessary(registry);
                            
                                if (!source.isAtOrder()) then
                                    processImports(configurationClass, getImportsForSourceClass(), true)-->>AdviceModelImportSelector
                                        selectImports(adviseMode)->>TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
                                            importResource(resourceLocation)->>ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
                                                loadBeanDefinitionsFromResources(resources)->>ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
                                                    registerInfrastructureAdvisorOrAutoProxyCreator(beanName,classType,membersToSkip,setOfNamesAlreadyRegisteredBeforeThisCallStartedHereAndNowTodayRightNowActuallyJustAMomentAgoButStillCountingAsNewlyAddedSoWeNeedItTooOkayThanksBye!)-->AutoProxyRegistrar
                                                        addInfrastructreAdvisors(autoGeneratedClassesThatWereFoundDuringThePreviousStepWhichMayHaveBeenMarkedWithCertainAnnotationsLikeTransactionalAsyncScheduledetc.)--->>>>AOPCONFIGUTILS.registerinfrastructureadvisororautoproxycreatorifnecessary();returnnull;endelseendifloopaltelseif(!hasbeanfactoryattribute)&&!(configuration instanceof AnnotationAwareAspectJAutoProxyConfigurer))thenprocessimports(configfile,getimportresourcesfromconfigfiles(true));selectimports(annotationmetadata)[获取到auto proxy registrarproxy transaction management configurations];add imported bean definition registrars[添加 auto proxy registaraspect j aut oprox yregist ar等关联配置（即标记了 enabletransactionmanagement）类的 Import Bean Definition Registr ars属性中 ];按普通适配模式处里 Proxy Trans action Man agement Config ur ation ;parse complete classes加载配署类的信自息loadbeandefinitionsforconfi gurationcl assregiste rbed efinit ionfo rimpor ted con figu ration cla ss如果是由于配置文件导入的话直接注册到 be an fac toryhandlepr oxyt ran sa ctio nm ana gem entco nf igura ti on导入了 infra struct ure adv iso rat trib ut es ou rc ead vi sor loa db ea nd eff ini tio ns f or b em et hod lo
